examples: The "Shrek" fish was recently discovered by scuba divers and is actually called an Asian Sheepshead Wrasse, which is commonly seen off the Japanese coast.
Manta rays regularly visit "cleaning stations" where small wrasse fish clean them of parasites.
A shy and elusive fish, a Napoleon wrasse at Orona island is a good omen for the Marine reserve.
Farmed ballan wrasse have been introduced to a Scottish salmon farm for the first time.
He said species he would normally expect to have returned, such as wrasse, pouting and spider crabs, have not appeared.
